acceptance_targets: [chapter_14_F001] PASS only if revised material at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:269-273 or snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:399-403 shows at least one observable detention action (physical handling or restraint) and one explicit rights/process breach witnessed by a character; FAIL if Deshawn's detention remains only reported via static or quoted recap.

[chapter_14_F002] PASS only if a careful reader can cite at least one plausible attacker-access path and one timing anchor from snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:157-195 without external chapters; FAIL if the scene still provides only body presence plus command reaction.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS only if revised material at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:269-273 or snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:399-403 shows at least one observable detention action (physical handling or restraint) and one explicit rights/process breach witnessed by a character; FAIL if Deshawn's detention remains only reported via static or quoted recap.
findings.problem: Sanitization drift: Clay's politically convenient detention of Deshawn is rendered as report language (radio fragment and hallway recap) instead of embodied scene consequence, which defuses institutional violence at the exact pressure point where the chapter's moral stakes peak.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:269, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:271, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:273, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:399, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:403, replace summary-only reporting with on-page concrete consequence: who physically takes Deshawn, what legal pretext is spoken, who objects, and what immediate harm/risk follows in the room.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS only if a careful reader can cite at least one plausible attacker-access path and one timing anchor from snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:157-195 without external chapters; FAIL if the scene still provides only body presence plus command reaction.
findings.problem: The chapter lands a major reversal (Thomas dead, Isaiah staged again) but with too few immediate causal breadcrumbs in-scene, so the reveal reads more as imposed twist than investigative inevitability.
findings.rewrite_direction: In the service-corridor discovery block anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:157, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:165, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:177, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:195, add 2-3 specific, non-solving clues (entry vector, struggle geometry, timing indicator, tool trace, camera/power tamper sign) that constrain how the killing and staging could have happened.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Prioritize structural and craft blockers first: causality, chapter architecture, stakes clarity, continuity logic, and all HIGH/CRITICAL defects.
revision_pass.label: HIGH/CRITICAL structural/craft fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: When edge cases arise, choose the version that preserves uncomfortable specificity and character accountability; do not replace difficult scenes with procedural summary, and do not mute class, race, sexuality, or institutional cruelty when those forces are actively shaping choices.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene with violence, racism, grief, or moral compromise is rendered in abstract or polite shorthand, revise to restore specific bodily, social, and material consequence before accepting the draft.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are the baseline in contemporary Mississippi speech; uncontracted forms are reserved for formality, emphasis, or social performance.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: rotate structural textures across chapters: procedural surge, quiet domestic interval, document-driven slow burn, dread preparation, aftermath inventory, and information-turn chapters; avoid repeating scene count plus dialogue density pattern in adjacent chapters.
prose_style_profile.diction: literary but grounded; precise legal and forensic terms when needed, balanced by lived vernacular and local material detail.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third person anchored primarily to Lena, with brief controlled expansions only when factual clarity requires it.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: alternate compressed procedural sentences with longer sensory-emotional lines so pressure and reflection keep rebalancing.
